sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount DOUBLE);
SELECT id, amount, cume_dist(amount) OVER (ORDER BY amount) AS cumulative_distribution FROM sales;
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, amount, cume_dist(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY (CASE WHEN amount > 200 THEN 'High' ELSE 'Low' END) ORDER BY amount) AS cumulative_distribution FROM sales;
